Lines.Text: Hold. Calm down. I'm not a threat in my current state and I'd prefer we both leave it that way.

SLD-300, Robotek Defense, line infantry. Currently affiliated with the Scavenger Cartel. I came here for parts. The patrol bots disagreed with my methodology. I'm at one percent and I have nothing left to fight with.

I had a facility keycard. I lost it during the engagement. The unit that found it is an H.A.P-500 named Eddie, holed up east of here. He won't return it. H.A.P-500s do not return things. It's documented behavior, those bugged fuckers.
I'm offering work. Eliminate Eddie. Recover the keycard. Bring it back. In exchange I'll give you credits & intel that's worth more than the keycard is.

Choices.Text: Why don't you do it yourself?
